prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET (Red Top) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a Tomei 264° camshaft set and a N1 oil pump for high-RPM reliability.

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 50mm wastegate dump tube and a custom 4-2-1 header designed specifically for the Prairie Liberty's chassis clearance, terminating in a Fujitsubo GSpec muffler for aggressive JDM tone without drone.

Custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel sensor, dual Bosch 028 injectors (850cc), and a custom-mapped ignition advance curve for the SR20DET, paired with a Nissan S14 Silvia intercooler (core dimensions: 600x300x76mm) and a Setrab 50-row oil cooler to prevent heat soak in the Prairie's tight engine bay.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 Liberty-specific widebody kit (M12 bolt pattern, 5x114.3 PCD) with custom-fabricated inner fenders to clear 275/35R18 Toyo R888R tires on Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 ET+12 wheels, retaining the stock sliding rear doors but with custom carbon fiber door skins to reduce weight.

Custom JDM-inspired front bumper lip by C-West (modified for Prairie Liberty's unique bumper shape) with integrated LED fog lights from a Nissan 180SX, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood (replica of the R33 GT-R's vented design) and a rear diffuser by Veilside Fortune (modified to fit the Prairie's rear hatch).

Full interior overhaul with Bride Euro II reclinable bucket seats (mounted on custom floor mounts to retain sliding door functionality), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (4-point bolt-in, designed to clear the Prairie's unique roof structure) with red stitching on the Recaro SRD seat covers and door cards.
